creator: shamaz.mazum@gmail.com
text:
> Which version of sway?

Firstly it was 1.6.1, not it's 1.7.r1

> Which apps in particular exhibit the glitch?

Xonotic, darkplaces, dhewm3 etc

> Can you reproduce with radeonsi from mesa-devel?

I do not know why, mesa-devel does not work for me.

> Can you bisect wlroots commits?

Oh yes, I can. It is 5dfaf5ea9ccaeddc236ca103147415b520f73d98. I reverted it and all seems to be working again:

https://github.com/shamazmazum/wlroots/commit/c045382ffb851da49c9b657fc42101a1b8abc17a

I hoped that somebody already did all dirty job for me :) I think I'll report it to wlroots repo.
